name: Desk Breaks
description: Two-minute resets you can do beside a desk.

entries.name: Wrist & Hand Reset
entries.summary: Loosen wrists and forearms after typing.

steps.title: Wrist Circles
steps.instruction: Make slow circles with the wrists, both directions.

steps.title: Prayer Stretch
steps.instruction: Press the palms together and lower the hands to feel a forearm stretch.

entries.name: Standing Backbend
entries.summary: Counter a slouch with a gentle standing extension.

steps.title: Stand Tall
steps.instruction: Feet hip-width, hands on the low back for support.

steps.title: Gentle Arch
steps.instruction: Lift the chest and look slightly up; never crunch the low back.
